mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, role, content, sequence, metadata, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY sequence DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND id >= #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT created_at FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY sequence DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
